message.content:
{
  "assessment_framework": {
    "marks_distribution": [
      "Unit 1: Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry - 7 Marks",
      "Unit 2: Structure of Atom - 9 Marks",
      "Unit 3: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties - 6 Marks",
      "Unit 4: Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure - 7 Marks",
      "Unit 5: Thermodynamics - 9 Marks",
      "Unit 6: Equilibrium - 7 Marks",
      "Unit 7: Redox Reactions - 4 Marks",
      "Unit 8: Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques - 11 Marks",
      "Unit 9: Hydrocarbons - 10 Marks"
    ],
    "question_paper_design": [
      "Theory Examination Time: 3 Hours",
      "Total Theory Marks: 70",
      "Formative Assessment Topics (Not in Summative): s & p Block Elements, The Gaseous State"
    ],
    "competency_weightage": [],
    "bloom_levels": [],
    "internal_assessment": [
      "Class record and viva - 4 Marks",
      "Project Work - 4 Marks"
    ],
    "practical_assessment": {
      "evaluation_scheme": [
        "Volumetric Analysis: 08 Marks",
        "Salt Analysis: 08 Marks",
        "Content Based Experiment: 06 Marks",
        "Project Work: 4 Marks (included in internal)",
        "Class record and viva: 4 Marks"
      ],
      "total_practical_marks": 30,
      "syllabus_categories": [
        "A. Basic Laboratory Techniques",
        "B. Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances",
        "C. Experiments based on pH",
        "D. Chemical Equilibrium",
        "E. Quantitative Estimation",
        "F. Qualitative Analysis"
      ],
      "visually_challenged_assessment": [
        "Same Evaluation scheme and general guidelines as Class XII",
        "List of apparatus for identification: Beaker, tripod stand, wire gauze, glass rod, funnel, filter paper, Bunsen burner, test tube, etc.",
        "Tasks: Odor detection in qualitative analysis; Procedure/Setup of the apparatus"
      ]
    },
    "project_assessment": [
      "Scientific investigations involving laboratory testing and collecting information from other sources",
      "Suggested Projects include: Checking bacterial contamination, Purification methods, Water hardness testing, Foaming capacity of soaps, Acidity of tea leaves/juices, Rate of evaporation, Effect of acids/bases on fibers"
    ]
  }
}
